title: Local Mocked Browser Approval UI Dry Run
objective: Implement a local-only browser approval dry-run panel on /pm-review/import-intake that builds the future PM approval envelope without sending a live POST or creating an approval row.
scope: Add a Local Approval Submission Dry Run panel to the Project Miner PM intake workbench.

Build the future approval envelope from candidate identity, source fingerprint, local decision draft, checked review evidence, warning acceptance, no-go acknowledgement, approval-status readback, and the future approval route.
Keep the dry run on-screen in browser state only.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove dry-run payload shape and zero mutation requests.
Update PM lane status/docs and record governed packet/handoff artifacts.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

live_write_gate.required_phrase: I explicitly admit PM Lane 142 live approval POST and first approval-row creation for the current Project Miner Temp Power import candidate.
live_write_gate.note: This phrase was not present for PM Lane 142A, so the lane remains local dry-run only.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 142A|Local Approval Submission Dry Run|local mocked|No live POST|No approval row|project import remains blocked|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed, guardrail search confirmed Lane 142A/dry-run/no-live-write language, and scoped diff check passed.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar recommended PM Lane 142A as a local mocked browser approval UI implementation touching the PM intake page, focused smoke, status/docs, and packet/handoff artifacts only. It reiterated no live POST, no approval row, no hosted action, no SQL/schema change, and no project import.
next_recommended_lane: PM Lane 143 - dry-run envelope export or operator review ergonomics, still no live POST unless the exact explicit admission phrase is provided
